caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" printed on it. The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as evidenced by the clothing racks and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, occasionally looking off to the side, suggesting he might be interacting with another person or responding to questions. The overall atmosphere is relaxed and informal, indicative of a friendly and approachable discussion.
